title: nirspy Pipeline
description: Schema for nirspy pipeline YAML files (schema_version 0.1). This file is documentation — it is not used as a runtime validator.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump minor (0.x) for backward-compatible changes, major (x.0) for breaking changes.

description.description: Optional free-form description of the pipeline.

steps.description: Ordered list of blocks. Execution follows list order.

enabled.description: When false the block is skipped during execution.

params.description: Maps block_id to its parameter dict. Only blocks with params need an entry.

additionalProperties.description: Params for a specific block. Keys depend on the block's params_class.
